title: Live i18n Dev Server Builder
description: Wraps @angular/build:dev-server and mounts the live-i18n save API.

buildTarget.description: A build builder target to serve in the format `project:target[:configuration]`.

translationsPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the primary folder of locale JSON files. Used as the default destination for new keys and as a search root (e.g. apps/playground/src/assets/i18n).

endpoint.description: Dev-server route that accepts translation save requests.

searchRoots.description: Workspace-relative folders scanned recursively for <lang>.json files (feature-split i18n). Defaults to [translationsPath]. node_modules/dist are skipped.

defaultPath.description: Workspace-relative fallback folder for keys not found in any scanned file. Defaults to translationsPath.

configFile.description: Workspace-relative .mjs/.js module whose default export may provide { resolveFilePath, searchRoots, defaultPath }. Required to supply a resolveFilePath function.
